name: ui-a11y-smoke-review
description: Quick UI/a11y smoke review by a designer — loading/empty/error states, focus, keyboard, aria/labels, compliance with UX Spec. Executed BEFORE handoff to QA.
default_prompt: Use $ui-a11y-smoke-review when the task matches the "UI & Accessibility Smoke Review" skill.
triggers: Quick UI/a11y smoke review by a designer — loading/empty/error states, focus, keyboard, aria/labels, compliance with UX Spec
